title: ‘Cries of delight’ as Sumatran orangutan filmed using canopy bridge to cross road for first time - The Guardian
summary_full: ‘Cries of delight’ as Sumatran orangutan filmed using canopy bridge to cross road for first time  The Guardian"We have watched and waited for this moment." World-first footage shows orangutan using canopy bridge to cross a road in North Sumatra  BBC Wildlife MagazineWatch The Moment a Critically Endangered Orangutan Crossed a Canopy Bridge For the First Time  ZME ScienceFirst Footage Of Endangered Orangutan Crossing Road Using Rope Bridge Is A Conservation Win  IFLScienceConservation Milestone: Sumatran Orangutan Filmed Using Canopy Bridge  streamlinefeed.co.ke
